definitions: Tending to show feelings, especially of affection, openly.
Serving to show or prove something.
Relating to or characterized by demonstration.
Grammar: (of a pronoun or determiner) indicating the person or thing referred to (e.g., this, that, these, those).
examples: She was always very demonstrative with her children.
The evidence was demonstrative of his guilt.
A demonstrative speech was given to the crowd.
